subject: fix(ui): flip search dropdown to open upward over the map
body:
Dropdown now opens above the search bar instead of below it, preventing
the mobile keyboard from obscuring search suggestions and recent searches.
Shadow direction flipped to match. Search bar z-index ensures dropdown
renders above the map section.
